w:r.w:t: (Go to References --> Update Table in Microsoft Word)
hello every one is very great
Below is the table representing number and Zonal strength in %
Place sceneries of green plants in east
Place Lord Brahma Picture in west
Respect old people and your teachers
Keep objects made of wood like wooden craft, table, glass, clock etc.
Keep wooden pen or wooden key ring with you
Keep 7 rods wind chimes in west zone of your house
Draw swastika at the entrance of house
Wear light colour clothes like white, light blue, light green etc
Place holy water in west of house
Respect all service providers in your life
Place brass pot of coins in West
Do not eat non-veg and liquor on Saturday
Bad luck, Least Worst Direction (Ho Hai)

It is also called as imperial guardian lions usually displayed as a couple, is an auspicious symbol in fengshui and believed to bring strong protection and blessings of wealth. Place it near your main door.
It is the combination of 6 times the infinity symbol and symbolizes a long and happy life full of good fortune. It acts as a protection symbol.
It is an auspicious symbol in fengshui and represents good protective energy. Place the big statue near the main door or the front garden of your home.
Crystals are often used to modulate energy, fill in missing spots, and bring sunlight and chi into the home.
It represents fire element and energy of sun and life. Smart use of red color accessories in your home will bring joy, strength and protection.
It is an auspicious symbol in fengshui and represents good energy.
Om Kraam Kreem Kroum Sah Bhaumaya Namah
Face east and chant using a red-colored mala.
Wheat, Copper, Gold, Jaggery,Masoor daal,Kesar(Saffron), Red clothes
Om Graam Greem Groum Sah Gurave Namah
Face east and chant using a yellow-colored mala.
Chana Daal, Gold, Haldi, Ghee,Religious books, honey, Yellow clothes
Om Pram Preem Pram Saah Shanaishcharaya Namah (ॐ प्रां प्रीं प्रौं सः शनैश्चराय नमः)
Face west and chant using a black-colored mala.
Til, Urad, Iron, Oil,Black cow, Shoes, Gold, Black clothes
Om Shraam Shreem Shroum Sah Chandraya Namah
Face north and chant using a white-colored mala.
Rice, Camphor, Sugar, Silver, White Sandel wood, Curd, White clothes
Om Draam Dreem Droum Sah Shukrāya Namah
Om Shukum Shukum Shukum Sah Sukumaya Namah
Face east and chant using a white-colored mala.
Rice, Gold, Silver, White Sandal, Curd, Sugar, Cow, Ghee, Religious books, honey, White clothes
Om Sraam Sreem Sroum Sah Ketave Namah
Face east and chant using a blue-colored mala.
Om Bhraam Bhreem Bhroum Sah Rahave Namah
Face east or west and chant using a black-colored mala.
Til, Urad, Iron,Copper, Oil, sapt-dhanya, Blanket, Blue clothes
Om Hraam Hreem Hroum Sah Suryaya Namah
Face east and chant using a red-colored mala.
Wheat, Jaggery, Copper, Gold, Red clothes
Om Braam Breem Broum Sah Budhaya Namah
Face east and chant using a green-colored mala.
within 2 hours from sunrise or sunset
Moong Daal, Gold, Ghee, Green clothes
Pusha, Gandharva, Roga, Bhallat, Jaya, Mitra
Pusha, Gandharva, Roga, Bhallat, Jaya, Mitra

You should plant Amala/Indian gooseberry(Emblica Officinalis) on any month when Moon is at your Janma Nakshatra. If that is not possible, you can also plant Palash tree. As this plant grows and flourishes, there will be progress in your life.

You should plant Bamboo/Baans(Dendrocalamus Strictus) on any month when Moon is at your Janma Nakshatra. If that is not possible, you can also plant Shami, Babool tree. As this plant grows and flourishes, there will be progress in your life.
📋 Below is the table representing Best Direction and the corresponding degrees
🔹 Store Room, Seasonal Cloths, Tool Box
Buy Camphor lamp and light it daily in your house.
Gayatri mantra chanting box: please place it in your house and continue playing it 24*7 in low volume.
Gods reside in fragrance, light a scented oil diffuser in the house.
Put Ganga jal in silver pot in North zone of your house.
Clear Quartz (Sphatik) can be placed at center of house, NE and Study room, where we need more focus and creativity.
Rose Quartz can be placed in bedroom, south west (zone of relationship), It will nurture relationship.
Black Tourmaline can be placed near main gate, if resident has any kind of fear related to negative energy or intention.
Carnelian placed near study table encourages an open-minded approach in education.
Placing citrine rock in SW area will enhance stability in personal area.

NE is also called as Eshan Zone. It gives clarity of mind, vision, and ability to take right decision at right time. This is the place where vastu purush head is placed. Any anti element like anti colour, Toilet, Kitchen, Garbage, store room, Shoe-rack and cut in this area can give major health and financial issues. This is right place for “Puja room.” This zone represents water element. Blue is the natural color for this zone. however, based on the barchart, White/Green color can also be placed here.
Removes Overthinking Balances the Tridoshas to Reinstate in your own Self.
The Trishul embodies spiritual growth, protection, and the power to overcome negativity, representing strength, courage, and divine guidance.
Placing here will give better clarity in your thought and help you to take right decision and right time.
Always place it in north south axis.
ENE is zone of “Recreation and Fun”. Element for this zone is Wood. Natural color for this zone is Green. Based on the bar chart, blue or red color can be done here to balance.
For Victory in court cases and politics
This will help you to win in court cases, politics and getting desired contracts. It will also increase your profits.

This zone is for “Social association”. Element for this zone is Wood. Any growth in materialistic world is governed by this zone. It connects us with clients and society. Natural color for this zone is Green. Based on the bar chart, blue or red color can be done here to balance.
It will bring new connections and contacts.Skilled people will join your business and remove any obstacles while starting any new project. You will also win government deals and contracts.
Name, fame popularity and social connections

Sun gives you name, fame, power, dominance and social connections by sharpen your skills and intellegence.IT enables political power and social connections. It also ensures successful meetings and gatherings.
Place it at height of 7 feet and face of sun should be smiling and calm.

This zone is called as “Zone of Churning” and denote Anxiety analysis. This place is not good for bed, or keeping any valuable stuff here. Toilet is most appropriate activity in this zone. Element for this zone is Wood. Natural color for this zone is Green. Based on the bar chart, blue or red color can be done here to balance
Enhances your work and improves performance.

It will reduce unnecessary/unexpected delays and improve your performance resulting satisfaction of your clients and customers. Very good for artistic or creative profession. They will leave a lasting impression.
It converts negative and unfavourable energies into positive and favourable one and help you to fullfill your desires

This zone is called as “Agney” and best place for Kitchen. This falls under fire zone. Situation of “Cash and Liquidity” is determined from this zone. It also represents Planet Venus and land lady. Any defect in this zone leads to negative impact on the health of house lady as well as cash and liquidity. Natural color for this zone is Red however based on the bar-chart, Green/Yellow color can also be placed here.
Flame ignites Fire, creates speech, removes fear, protects, and provides resources and money.

This zone denotes “Power and Confidence”. This gives you courage and makes your image as “Captain cool”. This falls under fire zone. Natural color for this zone is Red however based on the bar-chart, Green/Yellow color can also be placed here.
Hanuman Ji symbolizes empowerment, strength, confidence and resilience, drawing from his legendary character in the Ramayana.

This zone denotes “Relaxation, Name and Fame”. Best activity for this zone is bedroom. This falls under fire zone. Natural color for this zone is Red however based on the bar-chart, Green/Yellow color can also be placed here.
Ensure effective marketing and brand building

It encourage the development of a market for your products, increases sales and aids in establishing your company's brand name in the market. It also ensures that your company produce are of an extremely high quality and your company gets recognition for It.
It will bring fame and reorganization in the area of your work.
Red elephant brings strength, abundance and success. It can be place at both north and south zone. It should face towards center of the house.
For Victory in court cases and politics
This will help you to win in court cases, politics and getting desired contracts. It will also increase your profits.
For Quick turnaround of your work and quick flow of money

These horses speedup the pending task and fasten the speed of work resulting more money, fame and new orders. It infuses a new vigour and vitality to your public relations, and helps you to establish a respectful reputation in your business and social circles.
It should be place after balancing north and south zone and face should be towards north. Keep it on floor or on Almirah.

This zone denotes “Expenditure and Disposal”. This place is not good for bed, or keeping any valuable stuff here. Best activity for this zone is Toilet. This zone falls under earth zone. Natural color for this zone is Yellow, however based on the bar-chart, Red/White color can also be placed here

It will increase your gains by preventing wastage of money, relationship and health. This remedy decreases unnecessary expenditure and encourages savings; and this means that the wastage is stopped and profits increased. If you feel that your skills are being wasted or are not being put to proper use, then by just placing it, make sure that your abilities and talents are used beneficially. This remedy also gives you mental stability, and ensures that all constructive zonal energies remain healthy.
This zone denotes “Relationship and Skill”. This zone falls under earth zone. Natural color for this zone is Yellow, however based on the bar-chart, Red/White color can also be placed here.
• Place a happy family photograph in this zone and frame it using a metal frame for best results.
• Place rose quartz Balls with selenite stand in this zone.

It is very effective in removing stress and misunderstanding due to minor events. It also help person to get his/her life partner soon. Love birds remedy is very effective in developing a loving relationship in newlywed couples.
IT will give you far sightness and develop your skills and help you to set new standards in your area of work.
It should face towards North East.
It will increase the loyalty in your team
This zone denotes “Education and Saving”. This fall under Metal zone. Natural color for this zone is White, however based on the bar-chart, Yellow/Blue color can also be placed here.

Village scene painting in a black frame, when hang on the wall of WSW zone of your home enables you to buy your own property. This will be helpful to get right share in your ancestor property. Works wonder if possession is stuck/delayed due to any reason. It is also helpful for those working in real estate business.
Swan is designed to enhance studies and improve academic performance.

This will ensure that you have the collective support of a successful team. It encourages your employees to be supportive and cooperative. It enables them to makes the best use of their skills, and ensures that your business scales heights. This remedy brings an increase in business, communication and encourages a better accounting system in your business.
the mountains must not be barren, This picture or photograph must be framed in a golden frame.

Weighing Scale is the best remedy to get the effects of the Libra Sign. By placing the Weighing Scale in the WSW zone, people start prioritizing the things that are mostly ignored in life and maintaining a balanced lifestyle. It is the best remedy for court cases and establishing the Saturn effect.
It will help your children to focus on their studies.
Apart from WSW, if you will place it at NNE, it will bring good health and bring quick recovery from illnesses.
This zone denotes “Gains and Profits”. This fall under Metal zone. Natural color for this zone is White, however based on the bar-chart, Yellow/Blue color can also be placed here.

If you feel overburdened and no one is there to share your load. Output is low, then using this remedy will make sure that your Team commitment and productivity will increase. Your business relationships will nurture. On one hand your burden will reduce and on other hand, benefits will increase
Camel should face towards the center of house.
It will bring success and benefits.

It should face towards North. The tortoise enables you to overcome all types of adverse situations. In addition you will get protection, mental peace, good health and guide to the path of continous success.
It will increase the loyalty in your team
Owl, the vahana of Goddess Lakshmi, symbolizes wisdom and foresight in wealth matters, highlighting that true prosperity arises from both material abundance and inner understanding.
This zone denotes “Depression and Detoxify”. This fall under Metal zone. Natural color for this zone is White, however based on the bar-chart, Yellow/Blue color can also be placed here.

It will first remove any form of stress, stagnation or lethargy, then will fill you with youthful energy, remove any kind of negative thoughts or blocked emotion. Once done, it will smoothen-out any sluggish process and solve any complex situation. It will make you problem solver and increase the co-ordination of your employees, bring dedicated people to work with you. It will encourage people to work beyond their capabilities.
This zone denotes “Support and Banking”. This fall under Metal zone. Natural color for this zone is White, however based on the bar-chart, Yellow/Blue color can also be placed here.

Placing Ashoka sthamb will give you government favour, government tenders and grants. For government employees, it will support them to get promoted and give them fame.It helps politicians to get good ministry and departments.
Never placed in South or South East, otherwise it will give you trouble from government in form of notices, government agencies raids etc.
Place Airplane in this zone provide opportunities for foreign travel. You can also place your passport, visa, luggage, World map or Globe here.

Plane should be pointing up and it should face in the direction where you want to fly, for example if you want to travel Europe/USA from India, then it should face towards west, while if you want to go to Australia, it should point to South east direction.
Ensure smooth Banking, Brand and trust building

It will increase the trust on you and your company brand. You will get bank support and loans easily. It will remove any obstacles relating to money matters. For salaried class, it will increase your salary.
This zone denotes “Sex and Attraction”. This fall under Water zone. Blue is the natural color for this zone. however, based on the bar-chart, White/Green color can also be placed here.

It enables you to secure money for buying land and for building construction. It also aids in generating capital investments and gathering of funds for machinery from banks or financial institutions. It will bring large profits from land and property investments.
North is the zone of Money and Opportunity. This represents water zone. Blue is the natural color for this zone. however, based on the bar-chart, White/Green color can also be placed here.
• North zone is governed by Kuber Ji. Put the Kuber Statue or Kuber yantra in this
zone, and don’t do the Diya batti to Kuber ji. This is for Wealth.
It will bring fame and reorganization in the area of your work.
Red elephant brings strength, abundance and success. It can be place at both north and south zone. It should face towards center of the house.
For attract money and richness in your life
Kuber ji is care taker of wealth. He gives increase in money flow and new opportunity in the career. He will ensure growth in your chosen career and success in business.
As Kuber ji is yaksha, so we should not perform diya batti to him

Arrange a bunch of brightly coloured flowers in blue or green vas helps for converting your efforts into money. For salaried employee, it will support pay rise or promotion. same will also enable you to gain knowledge and master subjects that help you to grow and progress in your chosen area of work.

The Shankha or conch should primarily be used for announcing new products. Placing the Shankha in the North zone invites new opportunities; however, positioning it there also signifies that a new product has been launched and buyers are welcome.
This zone denotes “Health and Immunity”. This represents water zone. Blue is the natural color for this zone. however, based on the bar-chart, White/Green color can also be placed here.
Lion will boost your confidence, increase your power and position. It will ensure the steady flow of wealth generated through the influence of your company, business and your personality.
Lion should face towards center of house.
Placing here will give better clarity in your thought and help you to take right decision and right time.
Always place it in north south axis.
You are into female readymade clothing business.
This sector is owned by planet “Venus”.
Mode of business is online which is owned by Rahu.
You need to please Venus in various ways to make money from clothing industry.
Important axis for those who work in clothing industry is NW-SE axis.
As per vastu SE zone is owned by Venus while as per Numerology #6 is represent by Venus.
Venus is also karak of branded cloths, cosmetic, perfume, cinema, luxury hotels and fine dining.
Try to use this stuff to activate your Venus.
So, every Friday evening, if possible, prepare/buy kheer, or white color sweet, host a party, offer kheer or white sweet to others.
These changes at home will anyway create smooth flow of money, good health and professional front.
Still if there are few anti elements in your office/factory vastu, that will continue to spoil.
Please keep good Rose Quartz (Venus), multilayer pyramid and table max at your office to avoid such disturbance.
It is also suggested to comply both office and home as per Vastu.
General Remedies For Avoiding Delay in Marriage
Add a pinch of turmeric powder, mix it with a bucket filled with water, and take a bath with it.
On every Thursday, offer water to the banana plant and light a lamp.
Offer jaggery and roti to the cow
Write angel code '147023' either on the Venus mount of your left hand or anywhere on the left hand using an Orange/Pink/Blue color pen.
Vastu Analysis regarding Marriage & Corresponding Remedies

Although each direction has its significance and role, few directions and zones (in case of imbalance, cut, extension, toilet) are mainly responsible for delays in marriage and should be analyzed significantly.
Not getting good prospects, missing social connections.
In case of cut effect, - Demand for Dowry.
In case of Extended – Unnecessary expectation, that can’t be met.
This zone is the zone of ancestors who are responsible in Vaastu for marriage. If your ancestors are happy then there will be no delay in marriage.
Relatives do not come with relations. They do not trust you and your children.
Lack of Clarity, Wrong Decision making.
Lack of Attraction, lack of craving for matrimony pleasure.
Not preferred type of prospect proposal.
Toilet in NE can give court cases. Remove it.
Main door here or Toilet or Green/Red color here can give court case. Treat it.
Toilet at South east or blue/black color can give court case.
Toilet or green/blue/black color at South west can give disputes in ancestor/Family property.
Blue/Black color or boring at this zone can give court case with inlaws.
General Remedies for Winning Court Cases
Talwar/Sword: Keeping it at ENE zone of your house help you to win the court case.

Village Scene: Keeping village Scenery in black frame at WSW zone help you to win court cases regarding property. If case is regarding your ancestor property then open your virtual door entry at “N4”.
Never keep document related to litigation at South-East of your house.
Keep court case papers at North West zone Almirah. Almirah should open in East direction, So while opening the door, your face should be at west.

You can place photograph of opponent and Judge at NW zone, or you can write the name of those and place it at NW zone. Incase case is with government then you can place Ashoka emblem/Sthambh at this zone.
Vastu Analysis regarding Court Cases & Corresponding Remedies

Although each direction has its significance and role, few directions, zones and Devta fields (in case of imbalance, cut, extension, toilet) are mainly responsible for court cases and should be analyzed significantly.
It provides you good people support and good Advocate.
It provides you right knowledge to fight.
Provide right Solution and control Emotions
Protect you from opposite party to overpower you. Protect you from any negativity.
It gives Money, profits and success.
This entrance is ideal for entry, no need to block it.
It is ideal for organizations and companies dealing with banks as it gives higher bank balance to the inhabitants.
This entrance is ideal for entry, no need to block it.
It attracts beneficial gains from influential people.
This entrance is ideal for entry, no need to block it.
Same can be blocked by Aluminium strip and blue color/tape.
Remove commode if possible. if no option then Block Commode 3 sides with brass strip and 8 studs or Yellow color/tape.
Toilet here causes major health/progeny/financial problems, miscarriages and can even give terminal diseases.
Block Commode 3 sides with Copper strip and 8 studs or Red color/tape.
it will give rise to obstacles in life. It hampers the inflow of money, and the occurrence of any auspicious ceremony (marriages, births, etc).
Block Commode 3 sides with aluminium strip and 8 studs or blue color or blue tape.
It will leads to poor immunity. Users fall ill regularly and take a long time to recover.
Block Commode 3 sides with SS strip and 8 studs or Green color/tape.
it causes smaller social circles, and the society does not notice you. you may become unsocial gradually.
Block Commode 3 sides with SS strip and 8 studs or Green color/tape.
A toilet here makes people feel lethargic, with a sense of heaviness. They never feel refreshed. Most of the members of the family suffer from constipation.
Toilet here reduces anxiety and limits over-analytical tendencies.
Block Commode 3 sides with Copper strip and 8 studs or Red color/tape.
A toilet in this zone leads to low confidence, physical strength and lack of zeal or motivation to do a job. Chances of having a male child are also reduced.

If you want to choose Pyramid vastu then install the Pyraband at the toilet door, install the natron near Commode. To increase the energy of that zone, also place nano pyramid and clear quartz rock in the toilet.
It causes people to become desperate for fun and enjoyment in life, which they are unable to get.
Keep green baroda stone slab below the burner.
It brings in fame and recognition for the residents for the work done by them. They have a relaxed and comfortable life.
Keep green baroda stone slab below the burner.
It provides strength and confidence to family members; food cooked here is also delicious and healthy.
Keep green baroda stone slab below the burner.
it improves cash-in-hand position and zeal to do a job. However, it also increases aggression, but helps in the recovery of blocked payments.
Keep green baroda stone slab below the burner.
it leads to continual clashes among the family members, and after some time, males develop diseases like diabetes and hypertension.
Keep green baroda stone slab below the burner.
Keep green baroda stone slab below the burner.
It provides strength and confidence to family members; food cooked here is also delicious and healthy.
Keep green baroda stone slab below the burner.
It will have adverse effects on the residents’ health. They will suffer severe ailments and require regular medication.
Keep green baroda stone slab below the burner.
Under pyramid vastu, you can shift it by placing shift max pyramid at the center or south side of ceiling.
It's arrow should point to SE direction.
✦ Sacred Architectural Deities & Their Divine Influences ✦
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Shikhine Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Parjanyaya Namah
Dry lotus seeds along with ghee and grains.
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Jayantaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Kulishaya Namah
Five gems, nourishing food, and flowers.
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Suryaya Namah
Grass, wheat, jaggery cake, perfume, and barley.
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Satyaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Bhutaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Aakashaya Namah
Turmeric powder, beans, milk, ghee, and tagara plant.
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Vayave Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Pushane Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Vitathaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Grihakshataya Namah
Food mixed with honey and meat.
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Yamaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Gandharvaya Namah
Aloe wood (Aguru) and perfume with rice.
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Bhringarajaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Mrigaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Pitribhyo Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Dauvarikaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Sugrivaya Namah
Sweetmeats, neem tree twig, cooked food, and barley.
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Pushpadantaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Varunaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Asuraya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Shoshaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Papaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Rogaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Ahirbudhyaya Namah
Parched grains, fruits, flowers, and chestnut.
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Mukhyaaya Namah
Ghee, grains of rice, and wheat.
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Bhallataya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Somaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Sarpabhyo Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Aditiyai Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Ditiyai Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Adabhya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Savitre Namah
Milk, boiled rice, ghee, fish, or corn.
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Jayaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Rudraya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Aryamne Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Savitre Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Vivasvate Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Vibudhadhyapaya Namah
Ghee mixed with haritaal and rice.
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Mitraya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Rajayakshmane Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Prithvidharaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Aarshavatsaya Namah
Om Bhu Bhuvah Swah Brahmane Namah
Wreath of flowers, perfumes, incense, milk, honey, ghee, milk pudding, and rice with parched grains.

This field grants fulfillment of wishes. A person becomes organized and there is order in his life and works by planning as a result his tasks do not remain pending due to which he gets success. Leadership qualities develop and work is delegated, and responsibilities are shared. Generally, this place in the plot remains empty.यह ऊर्जा विचारों को व्यक्त करने और दुनिया को विचारो से प्रभावित करने की शक्ति देती हैं। यह सभी शक्तिशाली विचारो का स्रोत्र हैं। जो योजनाओं की शक्ति देता हैं। यह दिशा असंतुलित होने से आंखो में परेशानी होती हैं।
The power of transformation, progression. यह परिवर्तन को नियंत्रित करता हैं और प्रकिया को आगे बढ़ाता हैं।
Cause to change and Control the change

This energy field stabilizes the mind and provides the required support to pursue ideas. Imparts leadership abilities and works aggressively and quickly.ये देव आधार व शक्ति देकर मज़बूती व पकड़ प्रदान करते हैं। यह असंतुलित होने पर मन अस्थिर हो जाता हैं।

The energy that gives proficiency at work, prosperity, emotional pleasures and cravings. Receives respect in society and is prosperous.यहां भावनात्मक रुप से कमज़ोर इंसान को आनंद मिलता हैं और लालसा व तृष्णा में संतुष्टि मिलती हैं।
Parched grains, fruits, flowers and chestnut.

The energy that can bring about addiction, illness and guilt. When auspicious, the person does not fall, remains healthy and wins over his enemies.यह दिशा व्यसनों, नशीले पदार्थ, रोग और मन को कमज़ोर करने की दिशा हैं। जातक अंन्य की गलतियों को ही निकालता रहता हैं और समाज से अलग हो जाता हैं जिससे व्यसनों व नशे का सहारा लेता हैं। शरीर में ग्लानि और दुखों का जमाव होता हैं जिससे मानसिक रुकावटे आती हैं।

The energy that can bring about addiction, illness, and guilt. When auspicious, the person does not fall, remains healthy and wins over his enemies.यह दिशा कमज़ोर ताकत को मज़बूती प्रदान करती हैं और रोगो को नष्ट करके शक्ति देती हैं। कठिन समय में सहायता व मज़बूती देती हैं। जैसे इन्वर्टर चार्ज़ के लिए बिज़ली लेता हैं और जरुरत के समय सहायता करता हैं उसी प्रकार यह दिशा भी संतुलित हो तो जरुरत पड़ने पर लोगों से धन व सहायता प्रदान करती हैं।
Weakening, disease, provides help in need but consumes your resources daily

The power of administration and connectivity. A person is fortunate and gets good advice. Blessed with prosperity, is always enthusiastic and gets cooperation from administration.ये लोगों के बीच सहयोग की शक्ति विकसित करने की महत्वपूर्ण ऊर्जा हैं। इसमें सर्वौच्च प्रशासन से काम लेने व प्रशासक के गुण हैं और उच्च पद वाले सरकारी लोगो से संबंध बनाना और भौतिक सुखो को बढ़ाने में सहायक करता हैं।

Health remains disturbed and medicines may not give the desired effect if the pada is inauspicious.इनके पास सभी प्रकार की हीलर की शक्तियां हैं। जो रोग प्रतिरोधक क्षमता को बढ़ाता हैं। मुसीबतो को झेलने की शक्ति देता हैं। मानव में बल व विज़न देता हैं।

All pastel colors like cream and off-white are neutral colors and can be used without any worry. Try to use light color shades.
Zones not marked with any color fall under the Grey zone.
